faqs.q: What is the Communication & Confidence Program?
faqs.a: It is an intensive 8-week English communication course held at Punjab Tianjin University of Technology, Lahore. Classes run Flexible days (Regular & Weekend Batches) from 5:00 PM to 6:45 PM — 24 total sessions.

faqs.q: Who is this program designed for?
faqs.a: Students, fresh graduates, and young professionals who want to speak English confidently in interviews, workplaces, and everyday conversations.

faqs.q: What will I learn in 8 weeks?
faqs.a: Spoken English, Professional Communication, Public Speaking, Interview Preparation, Critical Thinking, and Confidence Building.

faqs.q: Can I attend classes before paying?
faqs.a: Yes. Our Free Trial Classes let you attend 3 full sessions at no cost and with no obligation. You experience the real program, meet Sir Shayan, and only then decide. Book your trial at speaklabbyshayan.com/trial-classes.html or on WhatsApp.

faqs.q: How much does the program cost?
faqs.a: Special August Batch fee is PKR 20,000 (regular PKR 30,000). Secure your seat with PKR 10,000 registration fee, balance due by 5th of next month.
Only 20 seats are available for the August Batch. Once filled, registration closes.
Click Enroll Now, fill in your details, and our team will contact you on WhatsApp to confirm your seat and share payment details.

faqs.q: Will this program help me in job interviews?
faqs.a: Yes. Interview Preparation is a core module. You will practice real scenarios and develop the communication skills employers look for.

faqs.q: Is the class online or in-person?
faqs.a: Classes are in-person at Punjab Tianjin University of Technology, Lahore.
You can reach us at info@speaklabbyshayan.com and our team will respond within 24 hours.
Yes. Pay PKR 10,000 to reserve your seat, remaining PKR 10,000 due by 5th of next month.
Our students consistently say it's the best investment they've made in themselves. One session can change how you see yourself as a communicator.
Physical & Live sessions. Schedule shared after enrollment.
Yes — a SpeakLab Certificate of Completion is awarded after finishing the 8-week program.
